name: Shrimp Ono Nui (Coconut Shrimp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge each shrimp in all-purpose flour, shaking off any excess.
2. Beat the eggs and dip the shrimp in them.
3. Roll the shrimp through shredded coconut, ensuring they are evenly coated.
4. Deep fry the shrimp at 375°F until golden brown.
5. Serve with cocktail sauce to which crushed pineapple is added according to taste.
